feed.title: Paolo Serra
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: OAuth2 - What was wrong?
entry.summary: Requirements OAuth2: What it is and how it works Open Redirect: What is XSS: What is CSRF: What is Intro During my spare time in summer, I decided to get into OAuth2 in 3 simple steps: I bought the book called “Oauth 2 In Action” I read it I started to look for vulnerabilities in real web applications The most exciting part was the last one. Surfing a websit...
